---
title: "nitrix.register.regulariser"
generated: true
signature-hash: bceb91046cfbd312
description: "Explicit penalties on a displacement / velocity field."
listing:
  id: nitrix-register-regulariser-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-register-regulariser/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.register.regulariser`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Explicit penalties on a displacement / velocity field.

The diffeomorphic Demons recipe regularises *implicitly*, by
Gaussian-smoothing the update (the Green's function of the
fluid/diffusion operator). These are the *explicit* penalties a learned
or directly-optimised warp adds to its objective:

- [`gradient_smoothness`](nitrix-register-regulariser/gradient_smoothness.qmd) -- the diffusion (first-order) penalty
  $\|\nabla u\|^2$ per voxel, summed over components: the
  squared Frobenius norm of the displacement Jacobian. Penalises sharp or
  incoherent flow.
- [`bending_energy`](nitrix-register-regulariser/bending_energy.qmd) -- the thin-plate (second-order) penalty
  $\|\nabla^2 u\|^2$: the squared Frobenius norm of the
  per-voxel Hessian. Penalises curvature rather than slope (an affine
  flow is free).
- [`jacobian_folding_penalty`](nitrix-register-regulariser/jacobian_folding_penalty.qmd) -- penalises folding (loss of
  invertibility) via $\operatorname{relu}(-\det J)$ of the
  deformation Jacobian $J = I + \nabla u$: zero where the map is
  locally orientation-preserving ($\det J > 0$), growing with the
  degree of fold ($\det J \le 0$).

All take a channels-last field `(*spatial, ndim)`, build on the shipped
`geometry` differential operators, and are differentiable.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-register-regulariser-symbols}
:::
